project_type: AWS CDK Python app - serverless audio processing pipeline
build_system: pip + CDK CLI (npx cdk). Must use NODE_OPTIONS='' to avoid proxy-bootstrap.js conflict.
test_framework: pytest with aws_cdk.assertions, fixtures in tests/conftest.py
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-py-kiro && NODE_OPTIONS='' npx cdk synth -c environment=dev
verification_instructions: 1. Run pytest tests/ to verify all tests pass. 2. Run npx cdk synth -c environment=dev to verify synthesis. 3. Run npx cdk synth -c environment=prod to verify multi-env.
setup_instructions: pyenv global 3.11.15 && pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode. NODE_OPTIONS must be set to empty string for all node/cdk/pytest commands. Python 3.11.15 via pyenv. Node.js 22 available.
contribution_requirements: TDD-first: write failing tests before implementation. Use aws_cdk.assertions. Stack code in cdk_base/. Tests in tests/unit/. Commit messages use type prefixes (feat:, fix:, etc.). Update ARCHITECTURE.md after changes. Maintain least-privilege IAM.
key_patterns: Tests use conftest.py 'template' fixture that synthesizes CdkBaseStack with default (dev) context. Test patterns include: resource_count_is, has_resource_properties with Match, find_resources for detailed inspection, json.dumps of DefinitionString to check state machine structure. State machine definition uses CDK L2 constructs (sfn_tasks.DynamoPutItem, sfn_tasks.LambdaInvoke, etc.) with .add_catch() and .next() chaining.
directory_structure: cdk_base/ - CDK stack definitions; lambda/sleep_audio_processor/ - Lambda handler code; tests/unit/ - pytest tests; .github/workflows/ci.yml - CI config
